headline: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Expands Its Futures Suite, Is The 30% Undervalued View Convincing?
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has drawn fresh attention after announcing plans with NATIVX to launch GPU compute futures tied to the COIL Index, along with new contracts linked to central bank decisions and US natural gas storage. See our latest analysis for Intercontinental Exchange. Despite the new futures launches, Intercontinental Exchange’s share price has softened, with the stock down 15.6% year to date and its 1-year total shareholder return declining 24.7%, while 3-year and 5-year...
